v0

I've been locally updating the snapshot for months without issues. Tested mainly on Skylake GT2 + drm-next-kmod (Linux 4.9) + i965 (DRI3) + intel (SNA, DRI3) via mpv (EGL + VAAPI), rpcs3 (OpenGL 4.3+), firefox (WebRender).

Carlos, can you test on Sandy Bridge?
Greg, can you test on Haswell?
